instruction:
At the surface of the ocean, the water pressure is the same as the air pressure above the water, about $15 \quad lb/in^2$, Below the surface the water pressure increases by about $4.84 \quad lb/in^2$ for every 10 ft of descent. Write a function $f(x)$ which expresses the water pressure in pounds per square inch as a function of the depth in inches below the ocean surface. $f(x)=$ [ANS]
At what depth is the pressure $100 \quad lb/in^2$? [ANS] in
